---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2015-05-30T19:51:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '4470740142904642645'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<p class="mobile-photo"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0530151449-765988-fb5504959d1d.jpg"><img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0530151449-765988-565b22397e83.jpg"  border="0" alt="" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6154754564530238242" /></a></p>#Artichoke in Bloom in #FortWorth
